posts.caption:
Pohela Boishakh Recap! Our last event of the semester 🐯🙌

We had an amazing time celebrating Bengali New Year and all the memories we made this year. Thank you to everyone who came out! Wishing everyone joy and a beautiful new year ahead. 🌺

MEET YOUR NEW 2026-2027 P-TEAM! WE ARE SO EXCITED FOR THE UPCOMING YEAR! 🇧🇩🙌

Co-Presidents: Isra Siddiki and Mashiur Rahman Khan
Vice President: Wasi Hussain

VABS BOARD APPS are officially out!! 🇧🇩✨

If you’ve been looking for a way to get more involved, join our community, and help shape what next year looks like, this is your sign!! Applications close on the 30th, don’t miss it 🤞
Need a break from studying?📚 Come over to the MCS tomorrow for FREE chai ☕️ and cheesecake and taste delicious cooking🥘 made by the MAC and VABS members!

Pohela Boishakh is TODAY! 🙌

Join us today from 4:30–7:30 on Wilson Lawn for a night of culture, community, and celebration 🇧🇩

Bring your friends, dress up, and celebrate the new year with us
See you there 🌸

OUR LAST EVENT OF THE YEAR IS TOMORROW! Come celebrate Bengali New Year with VABS & say goodbye to our seniors 😢. 

We can’t wait to see you! Good food and performances!

Come stop by Rand Wall tomorrow from 11:30–1:00 and treat yourself while making a difference 💛 every purchase goes toward supporting orphans with disabilities in Bangladesh. Bring your friends, bring your sweet tooth, and come show some love!! Donation link in our bio & on our story! Happy Giving Day! 🙌

Last week, VABS, ROCCA and UPSA hosted a History of Student Protests event with a strong presentation, great discussion, and really good food! We wrapped up with a Blooket and icecream!

Our upcoming Pohela Boishakh celebration is next week, can’t wait to close out the year together!! 🇧🇩🙌

Pohela Boishakh is almost here and we’re going ALL OUT 🎉
Celebrate the Bengali New Year with amazing food, music, games, and live performances all evening long! 

April 20 | 3:30–7:30 PM | Curry/Wilson Lawn

Last event of the year, DON’T MISS IT! 🇧🇩
TODAY IS THE DAY! The History of Student Protests Event is TONIGHT in the MCS! Come by for good food and games and an AMAZING presentation by the ROCCA Lab & VABS!

VABS STUDENT PROTEST EVENT IS TMR?? DILLY YOU DIDNT KNOW?? 🇧🇩

Come to the MCS at 6 PM tomorrow for our Student Protests in BD Event! Catering Bengali Food, The Horn & Sarabha’s!

HISTORY OF STUDENT PROTESTS IS THIS THURSDAY! 

Come by for good food and games! Cohosted with @vanderbiltupsa and the ROCCA lab 🙌
